_comment: Copy this file to manifest.json and replace the entries with your own scenarios. All fields marked optional can be omitted.
name: My Scenario
description: A short description shown on the Scenarios page.
_comment_files: Paths below are relative to the site root. The .empcdx.gz file must be served from the same origin.
_comment_weapons: Per-scenario weapon matrix config. Overrides the global parserConfig.json defaults. Omit to use the defaults.
_comment_tiers: Percentile thresholds (0–100) for the four damage-effectiveness tiers. Omit to use the parserConfig.json defaults.
